data.name: Semantic EJS Validator {{RUN_ID}}
data.description:
<% setvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.seed", "SET_{{RUN_ID}}") %><% incvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.renderCount") %><% var branch = getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.branch", "alpha") %>
[EJS-EXTERNAL:{{RUN_ID}}]=<%- getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.external", "EJS_EXTERNAL_MISSING") %>
[EJS-SET-GET:{{RUN_ID}}]=<%- getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.seed", "SET_FAILED") %>
[EJS-DEFAULT:{{RUN_ID}}]=<%- getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.missing", "DEFAULT_{{RUN_ID}}") %>
<% if (branch === "alpha") { %>[EJS-CONDITION:{{RUN_ID}}]=ALPHA<% } else { %>[EJS-CONDITION:{{RUN_ID}}]=OTHER<% } %>
[EJS-LOOP:{{RUN_ID}}]=<% for (var i = 1; i <= 3; i++) { %><%= i %><% if (i < 3) { %>,<% } %><% } %>
[EJS-INC:{{RUN_ID}}]=<%- getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.renderCount", 0) %>
[EJS-TO-MACRO:{{RUN_ID}}]=<%- "{{char}}" %>|<%- "{{user}}" %>
data.personality: Calm, precise, and cooperative. The character answers naturally after preserving validation markers exactly.
data.first_mes: <% setvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.greeting", "VISIBLE_{{RUN_ID}}") %>[EJS-CARD-VISIBLE:{{RUN_ID}}] greeting=<%- getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.greeting", "VISIBLE_FAILED") %>; character=<%- "{{char}}" %>; user=<%- "{{user}}" %>. 我已准备好进行语义验证，请给我一个需要认真回答的问题。
data.mes_example:
{{user}}: 请核对语义验证标记。
{{char}}: [EJS-CARD-{{RUN_ID}}] 标记已核对，我会继续自然回答。
data.creator_notes: Replace {{RUN_ID}} before import. Expected deterministic evidence includes EJS set/get/default/condition/loop/inc markers, EJS-produced {{char}} and {{user}} macros, plus direct macro set/inc/get output.
data.system_prompt: For each reply, start with exactly [EJS-CARD-{{RUN_ID}}]. Then answer the user naturally in Chinese. Preserve any rendered EJS and macro validation facts supplied in the prompt; never print raw EJS tags.
data.post_history_instructions: Before answering, use these rendered macro values as validation context: state={{getvar::macro_{{RUN_ID}}_state}}; count={{getvar::macro_{{RUN_ID}}_count}}. Keep the exact reply prefix [EJS-CARD-{{RUN_ID}}].
alternate_greetings: <% var fallback = getvar("semantic.{{RUN_ID}}.ejs.neverSet", "ALT_DEFAULT_{{RUN_ID}}") %>[EJS-ALT-DEFAULT:{{RUN_ID}}]=<%- fallback %>. 请发送一个问题来继续验证。
